title: Deprecating the `position` argument (again)
excerpt: The position argument has also been deprecated for the update_group mutation. You can now use the group_attribute and new_value arguments to move the updated group before or after a specific group on the board. Check out…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: The position argument has also been deprecated for the update_group mutation. You can now use the group_attribute and new_value arguments to move the updated group before or after a specific group on the board. Check out our documentation to find all the details!
